summary: A stepped pyramid-like monument or decorative structure with a rectangular footprint. The building features a tiered design with a stone brick base, wood plank middle section, and a gable roof. It sits on a white concrete foundation platform surrounded by a dirt courtyard. Multiple small window or decorative openings are visible in the stone layer.
rebuild_hints: Build white concrete foundation platform first, approximately 10x8 blocks
Construct stone brick base layer with evenly spaced window openings (appears to be 4-6 windows)
Add wood plank middle section with slight inset from base
Create stepped pyramid effect with progressively smaller wood plank tiers
Top with gable roof using wood planks, peaked at center
Ensure bilateral symmetry on all sides
Add dirt courtyard around foundation with border
uncertainties: Exact window count and spacing pattern unclear from angles shown
Precise block dimensions of each tier difficult to determine
Whether interior is hollow or solid
Exact wood plank orientation (horizontal vs vertical grain)
